MA.description: Mergers, acquisitions, divestments, stake transactions, and ownership restructuring.

subtypes.ACQUISITION: Company acquires another company or business asset.
subtypes.MERGER: Two or more legal entities merge or consolidate.
subtypes.DIVESTMENT: Company exits or sells a material stake in a unit or project.
subtypes.STAKE_PURCHASE: Company buys additional shares or equity stake without necessarily taking full control.
subtypes.STAKE_SALE: Company sells part of its shares or equity stake.
subtypes.OWNERSHIP_RESTRUCTURING: Ownership is reorganized internally or control is transferred.

CONTRACT.description: New contracts, large orders, bidding wins, contract extensions, terminations, and export orders.

subtypes.NEW_CONTRACT: Company signs a new contract with a concrete counterparty or scope.
subtypes.LARGE_ORDER: Company receives a large order without a clear bidding procedure.
subtypes.BIDDING_WIN: Company wins a tender, package, or bid-based project.
subtypes.CONTRACT_EXTENSION: Existing contract is extended or expanded.
subtypes.EXPORT_ORDER: Order or contract is explicitly related to export markets.

CAPITAL.description: Equity issuance, capital changes, bond issuance, and share buyback events.

subtypes.PRIVATE_PLACEMENT: Company issues shares privately to selected investors.
subtypes.RIGHTS_OFFERING: Company offers shares to existing shareholders.
subtypes.BONUS_SHARE: Company issues bonus shares or pays stock dividend.

LEADERSHIP.description: Changes in board, chairperson, CEO, CFO, or senior management.

subtypes.CEO_APPOINTMENT: CEO or general director is appointed.
subtypes.CEO_RESIGNATION: CEO or general director resigns or is dismissed.

EXPANSION.description: Expansion of factories, production capacity, branches, markets, or projects.

subtypes.NEW_FACTORY: New factory is built, started, opened, or put into operation.
subtypes.CAPACITY_EXPANSION: Existing plant or production line expands capacity.
subtypes.NEW_BRANCH: New branch, store, or point of sale is opened.
subtypes.NEW_MARKET: Company expands into a new domestic or foreign market.
subtypes.NEW_PROJECT: Company starts a new project that is not necessarily a factory.
subtypes.PRODUCTION_RESTART: Production or operations restart after interruption.

LEGAL_RISK.description: Investigations, lawsuits, administrative penalties, warnings, criminal cases, and disputes.

subtypes.INVESTIGATION: Company is under official investigation, inspection, or audit.
subtypes.LAWSUIT: Company is involved in a material lawsuit.
subtypes.REGULATORY_WARNING: Company receives a regulatory warning or request for explanation.
subtypes.CRIMINAL_CASE: Company or related leaders are linked to a criminal case.
subtypes.CUSTOMER_SUPPLIER_DISPUTE: Company has a dispute with customer, supplier, or partner.

PARTNERSHIP.description: Strategic partnerships, joint ventures, memoranda of understanding, distribution, and technology partnerships.

subtypes.JOINT_VENTURE: Parties establish a joint venture or jointly owned company.
subtypes.MOU_SIGNING: Parties sign a memorandum of understanding.
subtypes.DISTRIBUTION_PARTNERSHIP: Partnership is about sales, distribution, agency, or channel cooperation.
subtypes.TECHNOLOGY_PARTNERSHIP: Partnership is about technology transfer, platform, or technical cooperation.

LICENSE_APPROVAL.description: Licenses, permits, approvals, legal clearances, and investment approvals.

subtypes.PROJECT_APPROVAL: Project is approved or receives in-principle approval.
subtypes.INVESTMENT_APPROVAL: Investment plan, capital contribution, or expansion receives approval.
subtypes.LICENSE_GRANTED: License, permit, or certificate is granted.
subtypes.REGULATORY_CLEARANCE: Regulator clears legal conditions or authorizes a step.

BUSINESS_RESULT.description: Revenue, profit, loss, guidance, plan completion, and backlog updates.

subtypes.LOSS_REPORT: Company reports a loss or sharply higher loss.
subtypes.GUIDANCE_UPDATE: Company updates business plan, forecast, or guidance.
subtypes.BACKLOG_UPDATE: Company reports backlog or remaining contract value.

ASSET_TRANSACTION.description: Purchase, sale, liquidation, or transfer of assets, projects, land-use rights, subsidiaries, or affiliates.

subtypes.ASSET_PURCHASE: Company purchases a material asset, project, plant, or land bank.
subtypes.ASSET_SALE: Company sells or liquidates a material asset.
subtypes.LAND_USE_RIGHT_TRANSFER: Land-use rights or land bank are transferred.

DEBT_CREDIT.description: Loans, credit facilities, debt restructuring, default risk, bond repayment, and credit rating changes.

subtypes.NEW_LOAN: Company signs or receives a new loan.
subtypes.CREDIT_FACILITY: Company receives a credit limit or credit facility.
subtypes.DEBT_RESTRUCTURING: Debt is extended, refinanced, or restructured.
subtypes.DEBT_DEFAULT_RISK: Company faces late payment or default risk.
subtypes.BOND_REPAYMENT: Company repays, buys back, or handles maturing bonds.
subtypes.CREDIT_RATING_CHANGE: Credit rating is upgraded, downgraded, assigned, or withdrawn.

DIVIDEND_SHAREHOLDER.description: Cash dividends, stock dividends, ESOP, major shareholder transactions, and foreign room changes.

subtypes.MAJOR_SHAREHOLDER_TRANSACTION: Major shareholder or insider buys or sells a material stake.
subtypes.FOREIGN_ROOM_CHANGE: Foreign ownership room or foreign ownership limit changes.

PRODUCT_SERVICE.description: Product or service launches, discontinuations, recalls, and price changes.

subtypes.NEW_SERVICE_LAUNCH: Company launches a new service or platform.
subtypes.PRODUCT_DISCONTINUATION: Company discontinues a product or service.
subtypes.PRICE_CHANGE: Company changes product or service price materially.

MARKET_LISTING.description: IPO, listing, delisting, exchange transfer, trading warning, and trading suspension.

subtypes.IPO: Company conducts or announces an initial public offering.
subtypes.LISTING: Security is listed or begins trading on an exchange.
subtypes.EXCHANGE_TRANSFER: Security transfers exchange or market board.
subtypes.TRADING_WARNING: Security is placed under warning, control, or restricted trading status.
subtypes.TRADING_SUSPENSION: Security is suspended or temporarily halted.

ESG_OPERATIONAL_RISK.description: Environmental incidents, workplace accidents, supply-chain disruptions, factory shutdowns, and cyber security incidents.

subtypes.WORKPLACE_ACCIDENT: Workplace accident or factory safety incident.
subtypes.SUPPLY_CHAIN_DISRUPTION: Supply chain disruption or shortage of inputs.
subtypes.FACTORY_SHUTDOWN: Factory, project, or operation is stopped or suspended.

OTHER.description: Specific corporate event not covered by taxonomy v1. Use only when no other event type is reasonable.
